overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at night. The scene features thatched-roof cottages, dirt paths, and scattered villagers under a dark teal sky with warm light emanating from windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village path between thatched cottages

notable_agents.action: villager standing beside wooden cart on the left side of the path

entered.detail: traditional medieval hut with straw thatching and warm light in windows
wooden cart with large wheels parked beside the path
muddy dirt trail forming the main village thoroughfare
tall grass growing along the edges of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path through a medieval village at night. A thatched-roof cottage with glowing windows stands prominently on the right, while a wooden cart with a villager nearby sits on the left. The path is flanked by grass verges under a dark teal night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village thoroughfare with wooden fencing appearing on right

events.description: mounted villager on horseback becomes visible ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the village path, approaching a mounted figure ahead while passing additional villagers on the left

notable_agents.action: mounted villager on horseback positioned ahead on the path

entered.detail: rough wooden fence posts beginning to appear along the right side

segments.scene_description: As Geralt moves deeper into the village, the wooden cart falls behind and wooden fence posts begin appearing on the right. A mounted villager is visible ahead on the path, and additional thatched cottages line the left side. The dirt path continues straight through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: village edge with wooden palisade fencing

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden fence line toward the village perimeter or gate

entered.detail: tall wooden palisade fence running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the edge of the village where a wooden palisade fence runs along the right side of the path. The thatched cottages fall behind as the terrain opens up ahead. The dirt path continues toward what appears to be the village boundary or exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village at night that gradually transitions from a dense cluster of cottages to the open outskirts of the settlement. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path past a thatched-roof cottage with glowing windows and a wooden cart. As he moves deeper into the village, the cart falls behind and the scenery shifts to include wooden fence posts on the right and additional cottages lining the left side of the path. The scene then opens up as Geralt approaches the village boundary, where the houses recede and a wooden palisade fence runs along the right. Finally, the path leads away from the settlement and toward the open terrain beyond the village exit under a dark teal sky.
